title: audit_log_trail
description: One audit logging trail or equivalent control-plane log configuration — AWS CloudTrail, GCP Cloud Audit Logs sink, Azure Activity Log export. The single cross-vendor shape policies use for logging coverage and integrity checks.

id.description: Unique stable identifier (CloudTrail: ARN, GCP: sink name).

provider.description: Cloud provider short name: aws, gcp, azure.

is_multi_region.description: Trail covers all regions (not just the home region).

log_file_validation_enabled.description: Log file integrity validation / hashing is enabled.

kms_encrypted.description: Log storage is encrypted with a customer-managed key.
